examples: Because my dad wouldn't pay my tuition unless I declared premed.
This is one of our summer students from this past summer, who is also premed.
He was a premed student, also at Cornell, who incidentally also had a bad cold.
He exchanged startup ideas via e-mail with Smith, who was starting premed at Duke University.
Indian expatriate Sundeep Bhan spent two years at the University of Pennsylvania as a premed student before deciding his heart wasn't in it.
